title: SICE: Developments: Trade Policy - Common Market of the Southern Cone (MERCOSUR)
text:
Legal Framework of the Common Market of the Southern Cone 



















 26 March 1991 
 Treaty of Asuncion 


 29 November 1991 
 Economic Complementation Agreement N o 
 18 between Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay and Uruguay 






 17 December 1991 

 Protocol of Brasilia for the Solution of Controversies 


 17 January 1994 
 Protocol of Colonia for the Promotion and Protection of 
 Investments 






 17 January 1994 

 Protocol on Promotion and Protection of Investments Coming 
 from Non-MERCOSUR State Parties 


 16 December 1994 
 Customs Code of MERCOSUR 



 05 August 1995 
 Protocol of the Harmonization of Intellectual Property 
 Norms 






 17 December 1996 
 Protocol for the Defense of Competition 





 15 December 1997 
 Legal Framework on the Regulations Regarding Dumping 
 on Imports from non-MERCOSUR Countries 






 23 July 1998 
 International Commercial Arbitration Agreement of 
 MERCOSUR 







 23 July 1998 
 International Commercial Arbitration Agreement between 
 MERCOSUR and Bolivia and Chile 







 15 December 1997 
 Protocol of Montevideo on Trade in Services 






 05 December 2002 
 Agreement for the Regulation of the Protocol of 
 Competition Policy 





 18 February 2002 
 Protocol of Olivos for the Solution of Controversies






 5 July 2002 
 Agreement for International Freight Contracts Jurisdiction 
 between MERCOSUR Countries 





 06 May 2004 
 Rules of Origin of MERCOSUR 




 04 July 2006 
 Protocol of Accession of Venezuela to MERCOSUR 



 16 August 2008 
 Partial Scope Agreement N o 64 between Paraguay 
 and Venezuela 



 17 August 2008 
 Partial Scope Agreement N o 63 between Uruguay 
 and Venezuela 



 26 December 2012 
 Partial Scope Agreement N o 68 between Argentina 
 and Venezuela 



 26 December 2012 
 Partial Scope Agreement N o 69 between Brazil 
 and Venezuela

 MERCOSUR
